### Hourly Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — every 6 h. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Load Previous Snapshot

### Load Previous Snapshot

hubspot — `search` operation against the connected account.

Next: Fetch Changes Since Watermark

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Fetch Changes Since Watermark

GET https://api.example.com/v1/leads — retries 3× with backoff on failure.

Next: Normalize Records

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 API key / bearer for the target API

### Normalize Records

Custom JavaScript: Normalize incoming lead records to a stable schema

Next: Upsert into Google Sheets

### Upsert into Google Sheets

googleSheets — `appendOrUpdate` operation against the connected account.

Next: Advance Watermark

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Advance Watermark

Custom JavaScript: Advance the incremental watermark to the newest record seen

Next: Persist Watermark (HubSpot)

### Persist Watermark (HubSpot)

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

Next: Send Summary to Slack

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Send Summary to Slack

slack — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

# Augment company profiles with HubSpot and HTTP / REST API hands-free for Outreach (04586)

**Pattern:** Data Enrichment · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Augment company profiles with HubSpot and HTTP / REST API hands-free for Outreach (04586). It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual outreach is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Hourly Schedule → Load Previous Snapshot → Fetch Changes Since Watermark → Normalize Records → Upsert into Google Sheets → Advance Watermark → Persist Watermark (HubSpot) → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to data enrichment without manual effort
- Anyone automating outreach in sales
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Has retries and error handling built in
- Improves response time
- Responds in seconds

## Before first run
Connect credentials: API key / bearer for the target API; Google OAuth2 / service account; HubSpot private-app token; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your outreach process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
